TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Peter Mutharika I 1940 a miheca saka folad saka a romi'ad masofoc ci Peter Mutharika, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Malawi anini i ci Peter Mutharika, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: p…ôt…ôr mo~u~utńßarika i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i p…ôt…ôr mo~u~utńßarika, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ma…ĺawi anini i ¶i p…ôt…ôr mo~u~utńßarika, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
